text: {"recommendation":"Based on a 3-site analysis, Nordic Hydro is the recommended site with a weighted composite score of 0.672, a total capital outlay of $113.4M, and annual operating costs of $11.6M. The 9.8-year base-case NPV is $212.4M, yielding a levelized cost of $21K/kW — Under low and high cost scenarios this spans $19K/kW to $25K/kW. This ranking flips if Nordic Hydro power rates rise above $0.0240/kWh (+0.0% vs. current $0.0240/kWh), at which point Texas ERCOT becomes the lower-cost option.
